event: coved-type ST elevation in V1 and V2
admission to the intensive care unit
suspected septic shock from ulcerative colitis exacerbation
CT scan showed a high-density area in the descending colon
contrast-enhanced CT scan revealed a round low-density area of liver
determined to be a liver abscess
changed the antibiotics to meropenem and vancomycin
implantation of an implantable cardioverter defibrillator
abnormal uptake in the anterior mediastinum (Tc scintigraphy)
